invoice.notes: Payment is due within 30 days of the invoice date. Please reference invoice number INV-2026-0047 in your payment. Late payments are subject to a 1.5% monthly interest charge.
invoice.terms: All work is delivered as-is upon final payment. Intellectual property rights transfer to the client only after payment in full. Disputes must be raised within 7 days of invoice receipt. Governing law: State of New York.

items.name: UX Research & Discovery
items.description: User interviews (8 sessions), competitive analysis, persona development, and synthesis report.

items.name: Brand Identity Design
items.description: Logo redesign (3 concepts + 2 revision rounds), color palette, typography system, brand guidelines PDF.

items.name: UI Design — Web (Desktop + Mobile)
items.description: High-fidelity Figma screens for 12 page templates, component library, responsive breakpoints.

items.name: Senior Designer
items.description: Additional senior design hours for stakeholder presentation prep and asset exports.

items.name: Motion Design — Intro Animation
items.description: 15-second brand intro animation (After Effects source + MP4/WebM exports).

items.name: Stock Photography License
items.description: Extended commercial license for 6 curated stock images (Unsplash+).

items.name: Font License — Neue Haas Grotesk
items.description: Desktop + web license (5 seats, 100k pageviews/mo) via Monotype.

items.name: Rush Delivery Surcharge
items.description: Expedited turnaround on final deliverables (5 business days vs. standard 15).

payment.instructions: ACH and wire transfers preferred. Please allow 1–2 business days for processing confirmation.
